task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met: (1) RenameRequest struct in api/types.go with correctly json-tagged Source and Destination fields; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go POSTs to /api/rename; (3) Server RenameHandler in server/routes.go properly validates inputs, copies model via CopyModel(), deletes source with srcManifest.Remove(), returns 404 StatusNotFound when source missing and 409 StatusConflict when destination exists; (4) Route registration r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) correctly wired; (5) CLI command "rename SOURCE DESTINATION" with cobra.ExactArgs(2); (6) CLI RenameHandler calls client.Rename method with proper request construction; (7) No existing test files or code modified or removed. Implementation is complete, follows existing patterns, includes proper error handling, and preserves all existing functionality.
